name: codex-pm
description: A Codex-native project manager plugin that turns docs/ into verified development progress.

interface.longDescription: Codex PM reads docs/ Markdown project documents, builds a task graph, selects safe runnable tasks, briefs Codex, verifies the result, records execution memory, and supports adaptive project management experiments.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex PM to start this project from docs/.
Use Codex PM to recommend the next runnable task.
Use Codex PM to run one safe verified task.
Use Codex PM to review project progress and memory.
